hero.name: Janderson Vinicius
hero.subtitle: jandervs
hero.title: Visual Studio
hero.tagline: I turn complex problems into intuitive and memorable digital experiences.

about.heading: Creating experiences that matter
about.bio_1: I'm a UX/UI designer with 5+ years of experience creating digital products that balance aesthetic beauty and functionality. I believe good design is invisible — it just works.
about.bio_2: I work with startups and established companies to transform ideas into interfaces users love. My process always starts with research and ends with measurable impact.
about.bio_3: When I'm not designing, I'm exploring new technologies, studying cognitive psychology, or experimenting with animations and generative interfaces.

projects.title: Personal Finance App
projects.description: Complete redesign of a fintech app focused on reducing financial anxiety for users.
projects.full_description: I conducted research with 40 users to identify friction points in the original app. The redesign resulted in 35% increase in daily engagement and 60% reduction in support requests.

projects.title: Design System — E-commerce
projects.description: Creation of a scalable design system for an e-commerce platform with 200+ components.
projects.full_description: I built a design system from scratch using design tokens and atomic components. Reduced time to develop new features by 40% and ensured visual consistency across all products.

projects.title: Brand Identity — Studio Créatif
projects.description: Complete visual identity for a boutique creative studio in São Paulo.
projects.full_description: From brand strategy to the visual identity manual. Includes logotype, typography, color palette, stationery, and guidelines for digital and print applications.

items.title: UX Research & Design
items.description: User research, journey mapping, wireframes and prototyping to create experiences grounded in real data.

items.title: UI Design
items.description: High-fidelity visual interfaces, design systems and guidelines for cohesive and scalable digital products.

items.title: Digital Branding
items.description: Visual identity, logos and brand systems that communicate your business's unique positioning.

items.title: Motion & Interaction
items.description: Interface animations, micro-interactions and animated prototypes that elevate the user experience.

contact.heading: Let's work together
